name: Api-Gohan
description: API con descargas de YouTube, TikTok y herramientas de IA

items.name: YouTube MP3 (Y2Mate)
items.desc: Download YouTube audio as MP3 via Y2Mate
items.innerDesc:
🎵 Download audio from YouTube

Parameters:
• url - YouTube URL
• format=mp3 (default)
• quality - 128 (kbps)
• download=true - Direct download

Example: ?url=YOUTUBE_URL&format=mp3&download=true

items.name: YouTube MP4 (Y2Mate)
items.desc: Download YouTube video as MP4 via Y2Mate
items.innerDesc:
🎬 Download video from YouTube

Parameters:
• url - YouTube URL
• format=mp4
• quality - 360, 720
• download=true - Direct download

Example: ?url=YOUTUBE_URL&format=mp4&quality=720&download=true

items.name: TikTok Downloader
items.innerDesc:
📱 Download TikTok videos without watermark

Usage: ?url=TIKTOK_URL
Download: &download=true

items.name: HydroMind
items.innerDesc:
🧠 AI with multiple models

Parameters:
• text - Your message
• model - AI model to use

items.name: BRAT Image
items.innerDesc:
🎨 Create BRAT style images

Parameters:
• text - Text to display (required)
• background - Hex color (optional)
• color - Text hex color (optional)

Example: ?text=HOLA&background=%23000000&color=%23FFFFFF

items.name: BRAT Video
items.innerDesc:
🎬 Create BRAT style videos

Parameters:
• text - Text to display (required)
• background - Hex color (optional)
• color - Text hex color (optional)

items.name: Blue Archive
items.innerDesc: 🎮 Get random Blue Archive character images

items.name: API Status
items.desc: Check API status and system info
items.innerDesc: 📊 View API status, uptime, requests, and system information
